reason: Enabling pam_faillock.so in the preauth section of password-auth implements account lockout after failed authentication attempts, a standard STIG hardening measure that does not require system reboot and poses minimal risk when default parameters are used.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Potential lockout if pam_faillock.so parameters are misconfigured (e.g., too low unlock time); Failure to maintain authselect integrity could cause PAM misconfiguration
